message:
refactor(agent,extensions,main): idiomatic cleanups and correctness fix

- agent.rs: replace if-let-else with unwrap_or_else for tool abort
  placeholder construction; flip was_executed conditional to put the
  positive case first for readability (no behavior change)
- extensions.rs: replace map_or(true, |c| ...) with is_none_or(|c| ...)
  for regex-vs-division disambiguation — more idiomatic and clearer;
  fix evaluate_exec_mediation allow_patterns to use starts_with instead
  of contains, preventing substring false positives (e.g. "git" pattern
  should not match "digit" commands)
- main.rs: flip if-else for js_prewarm_handle to check empty case first,
  removing trailing else-None and improving readability

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
